decision_basis: The current speech-turn pipeline is a heuristic MVP and is not authoritative.
Party and electorate details are not extracted.
Validated member identity is not yet available.
future_validation_requirements: Validated member identity must exist before any speech-turn component can be authoritative.
Segmentation and identity attribution must be evaluated separately.
Hand-reviewed stratified samples must cover hard colon-marker, embedded-heading, no-speaker fallback, and multi-speaker cases.
